topic: Trademark profile photo for Mitozz Japan Instagram
objective: Create a long-term recognizable Instagram avatar that reads clearly inside a circular crop and instantly signals premium science-led wellness.
audience: Japan organic Instagram audience seeking premium, trustworthy, science-led wellness guidance
continuity_tokens: Centered hero composition that stays readable in a circular crop
Real Mitozz bottle silhouette and cap fidelity from approved product source
Soft steel-blue atmosphere with restrained apricot halo accent
No text, no badges, no extra props, no busy background details
visual_intent: Build a trademark-like brand avatar around the Mitozz bottle rather than a post-style layout
Keep the bottle large enough to remain recognizable at tiny profile-photo size
Use luminous clinical minimalism with warm vitamin-energy restraint
Feel premium, calm, memorable, and unmistakably Mitozz Japan
brand_guardrails: Do not redesign, recolor, simplify, or relabel the bottle
Preserve real-pack silhouette, cap finish, and front-label structure
No baked-in typography, logos, stickers, or UI elements outside the real bottle label
No cluttered supplement-ad styling, dramatic shadows, or dark moody lighting
Keep the result elegant enough to use as the permanent account profile image
composition: True 1:1 square canvas designed for circular crop safety
Bottle centered or microscopically offset but fully readable within the center 70 percent of the frame
Bottle occupies roughly 48 to 58 percent of frame height for small-size recognition
Background uses soft mist-blue to cloud-white wash with a subtle apricot glow halo
No tabletop clutter; if a surface exists it should be minimal and nearly abstract
Use a crisp focal silhouette with soft editorial light and restrained glow
reference_strategy: Use the approved bottle source as immutable product truth, then borrow only the atmosphere, palette, and soft-light restraint from the background-plate and cool-palette references. The output must feel like a distilled brand mark, not a copied post composition.
variation_guardrails: Vary crop, bottle distance, and halo intensity without changing the core centered-avatar concept
Do not duplicate the exact background plate layout or any reference crop
Favor stronger bottle legibility over atmosphere if the two compete
Keep the composition simple enough to remain clear at 40 to 80 pixels
negative_prompts: off-center crop that fails in a circle
notes: Creative direction: choose a bottle-led avatar because it will remain more recognizable and scalable than a portrait or text-heavy lockup in Instagram's small circular profile display.
